# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiVersion: kong/1.5
kind: Configuration
plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      hide_credentials: false
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 60
      hour: 120
      day: 720
routes:
  - name: service-a
    protocols: ["http", "https"]
    paths: ["/service-a/*"]
    upstream: http://service-a:8000
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
  - name: service-b
    protocols: ["http", "https"]
    paths: ["/service-b/*"]
    upstream: http://service-b:8001
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
upstreams:
  - name: service-a
    target: "http://localhost:8000"
  - name: service-b
    target: "http://localhost:8001"
